title: Vir Biotechnology Provides Corporate Update and Reports Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Financial Results
text: Vir Biotechnology reported Q4 2025 earnings results with revenue of $64.07 million, significantly exceeding the forecast of $1.42 million due to the Norgine license payment received in December 2025. EPS was -$0.31, compared to the forecasted -$0.54. Cash, Cash Equivalents & Investments totaled $781.6 million as of December 31, 2025, with a 2025 net change in cash and investments of approximately $314 million. R&D expenses for 2025 were $456 million, compared to $507 million in 2024, a 10% reduction. SG&A expenses decreased to $92 million in 2025 from $119 million in the prior year, representing a 23% decrease. The company simultaneously announced a landmark $1.7 billion collaboration with Astellas for VIR-5500. Cash runway was extended into Q2 2028 including Norgine and Astellas deal effects. Full year 2025 revenues of $65.6 million and net loss of $(126.2) million, or $(0.95) per share. The year represents significant progress in the company's transition from pandemic-related revenue to a diversified pipeline focused on infectious diseases and oncology.
